form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 6th over 340m at Bulli beaten 4.5 lengths (19.78) behind Huggett in a Grade 5 on April 7. Happy to overlook recent efforts. Well placed and gets chance to find best.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Rounding the home turn hampered off the back.

form.formComment: Has finished fifth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Nowra over 365m. Leading chance on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished fifth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Nowra over 365m. Leading chance on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the finish galloped on from behind.
Checked off heels in the first turn and came together.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.63) when fifth over 400m at Dubbo in a Grade 5. Still a maiden from this draw but has never missed the frame from three starts. Looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (23.63) when fifth over 400m at Dubbo in a Grade 5. Still a maiden from this draw but has never missed the frame from three starts. Looking to others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At first corner, heels galloped on and fell.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 1.75 lengths at this track over 350m (20.17) beating Gus And Dodo in Grade 4/5 on March 27. Happy to risk this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance to win by 1.75 lengths at this track over 350m (20.17) beating Gus And Dodo in Grade 4/5 on March 27. Happy to risk this time.

form.formComment: Just been plugging away and needs to improve after being unplaced in three tries. Last start 4th over 340m at Bulli. Be tough to make an impression against this lot.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Just been plugging away and needs to improve after being unplaced in three tries. Last start 4th over 340m at Bulli. Be tough to make an impression against this lot.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room exiting the back straight and lost momentum.
Galloped on heels at first turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Came from wide draw and finished last over 350m at this track beaten 7 lengths (20.69) behind Midnight Highway in a Grade 5 on March 13. Can't recommend her in this.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Came from wide draw and finished last over 350m at this track beaten 7 lengths (20.69) behind Midnight Highway in a Grade 5 on March 13. Can't recommend her in this.

form.formComment: Has been in the minors the last two, the latest showing strong pace early but gathered in and finished a 1.5 lengths third over 340m Bulli in 19.67. Solid showing expected.

form.formComment: Showed good improvement when third behind Huggett at Bulli last start over 340m (19.53). Has to be respected.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th over 365m at Nowra beaten 12 lengths (21.79) behind Angry Friendship in a Grade 5 on April 2. Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.
